app.name: The Cube
app.maintenanceMessage: The Cube is temporarily under maintenance. Please try again later.
app.blockedMessage: This version of The Cube is no longer supported. Please install the official version.

update.title: The Cube 2.0.38 is ready
update.message: Install the latest version for stronger playback recovery, more stream fallback choices, cleaner TV navigation, and safer update handling.
releaseNotes: Added more fallback choices for movies when the first server is weak or unavailable
Fixed one server group not showing streams that returned a different playable URL field
Filtered unsupported embed-only links from the native player list
Improved stream ordering so stronger native streams appear before weaker fallbacks
Improved TV remote navigation between the top header and page content
Kept playback cache and ahead-buffer improvements for smoother streaming
Kept update verification tied to the official signing certificate

items.title: The Cube 2.0.38
items.message: Playback fallback, TV navigation, and update reliability were improved.

items.title: Support The Cube
items.message: Support is optional and helps development. Third-party servers may still go down or return errors.
